headline: Parliamentary select committees published only 8 reports in 2025
context: Malaysia's 14 parliamentary select committees published a combined total of only 8 reports in 2025, with 6 committees producing no public output whatsoever.

cards.big: 14 select committees produced only 8 reports — 6 committees published nothing all year
cards.sub: Parliamentary oversight machinery exists on paper but barely functions in practice

cards.big: Standing Order 77 establishes committees but sets no minimum output requirements
cards.sub: Committees can exist indefinitely without producing any public accountability work

cards.big: Committee operations cost RM12 million in 2025 — RM1.5 million per published report
cards.sub: Output per ringgit spent suggests severe inefficiency in committee system

cards.big: UK House of Commons committees published 387 reports in same parliamentary session
cards.sub: Active committee systems produce orders of magnitude more oversight output

cards.big: Committees that don't publish reports aren't conducting oversight — they're conducting meetings
Should each committee be required to publish minimum 4 reports per year or be dissolved?
